; translate.qmd — Page Translator for reMarkable
;
; Adds a draggable floating translation box to xochitl's document view.
; Tap the "T" button to expand/collapse the panel. Drag the header bar to
; move it. Tap "Load Text" to populate the source-text field:
;   • PDFs  — text is extracted directly from the PDF's embedded text layer
;             (no OCR required; works for any digitally-created PDF).
;   • Notebooks / ePubs — uses xochitl's handwriting-to-text conversion
;             (.textconversion file).
; Then choose a target language and tap "Translate" to call the Google
; Translate API.
;
; Compatibility : xochitl 3.25 (hash selectors taken from FouzR/floating.qmd 3.25)
;                 xochitl 3.26 may work unchanged — see README for details.
; Depends       : qt-resource-rebuilder
; Install path  : /home/root/xovi/exthome/qt-resource-rebuilder/translate.qmd
;
; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
; AFFECT selectors (hashes) are taken from the document-view component that
; the floating toolbar also targets (3.25/floating.qmd in FouzR/xovi-extensions).
; The INSERT blocks use plain QML/JS — new identifiers never appear in the
; hashtable and therefore do not need to be hashed.
; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
    TRAVERSE [[233699089663818]]#[[6504254477]]
    LOCATE AFTER ALL
    INSERT {
        Item {
            id: translatePanel

            ; ── persisted position and state ──────────────────────────────
            property var  savedX: 60
            property var  savedY: 120
            property bool expanded:   false
            property bool loading:    false
            property string result:   ""
            property string sourceText: ""
            property string targetLang: "en"

            x: savedX
            y: savedY
            width:  expanded ? 750 : 100
            height: expanded ? 680 : 100
            z: 1000

            Behavior on width  { NumberAnimation { duration: 150 } }
            Behavior on height { NumberAnimation { duration: 150 } }

            ; ── outer container ───────────────────────────────────────────
            Rectangle {
                anchors.fill: parent
                color:        expanded ? "white" : "transparent"
                border.color: "#333333"
                border.width: expanded ? 2 : 0
                radius: 10
                clip:   true

                ; ── header bar (drag + toggle) ────────────────────────────
                Rectangle {
                    id: panelHeader
                    width:  parent.width
                    height: 100
                    color:  "#222222"
                    radius: 10

                    ; fill bottom corners so they look square against content
                    Rectangle {
                        anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
                        width:  parent.width
                        height: 10
                        color:  parent.color
                    }

                    Text {
                        anchors.left:            parent.left
                        anchors.leftMargin:      22
                        anchors.verticalCenter:  parent.verticalCenter
                        text:       translatePanel.expanded ? "Translate" : "T"
                        color:      "white"
                        font.pixelSize: 36
                        font.bold:  true
                    }

                    ; close button — only visible when expanded
                    Rectangle {
                        visible:                 translatePanel.expanded
                        anchors.right:           parent.right
                        anchors.rightMargin:     18
                        anchors.verticalCenter:  parent.verticalCenter
                        width: 60; height: 60
                        radius: 30
                        color: "#555555"

                        Text {
                            anchors.centerIn: parent
                            text:  "×"
                            color: "white"
                            font.pixelSize: 34
                        }

                        MouseArea {
                            anchors.fill: parent
                            onClicked: {
                                translatePanel.expanded = false
                                translatePanel.saveConfig()
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ; drag + tap handler
                    MouseArea {
                        anchors.fill:        parent
                        anchors.rightMargin: translatePanel.expanded ? 80 : 0

                        property real pressX:    0
                        property real pressY:    0
                        property real startBoxX: 0
                        property real startBoxY: 0
                        property bool wasDrag:   false

                        onPressed: function(mouse) {
                            pressX    = mouse.x
                            pressY    = mouse.y
                            startBoxX = translatePanel.savedX
                            startBoxY = translatePanel.savedY
                            wasDrag   = false
                        }

                        onPositionChanged: function(mouse) {
                            var dx = mouse.x - pressX
                            var dy = mouse.y - pressY
                            if (Math.abs(dx) > 8 || Math.abs(dy) > 8) {
                                wasDrag = true
                                translatePanel.savedX = startBoxX + dx
                                translatePanel.savedY = startBoxY + dy
                            }
                        }

                        onReleased: {
                            if (!wasDrag) {
                                translatePanel.expanded = !translatePanel.expanded
                                if (translatePanel.expanded) {
                                    translatePanel.loadConfig()
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                ; ── content area (only when expanded) ─────────────────────
                Column {
                    visible: translatePanel.expanded
                    anchors {
                        top:          panelHeader.bottom
                        left:         parent.left
                        right:        parent.right
                        bottom:       parent.bottom
                        margins:      15
                        topMargin:    12
                    }
                    spacing: 10

                    ; source-text input
                    Rectangle {
                        width:  parent.width
                        height: 140
                        border.color: "#aaaaaa"
                        border.width: 1
                        radius: 6

                        TextEdit {
                            id: sourceEditArea
                            anchors.fill:    parent
                            anchors.margins: 8
                            text:     translatePanel.sourceText
                            onTextChanged: translatePanel.sourceText = text
                            wrapMode: TextEdit.Wrap
                            font.pixelSize: 24
                            color: "#111111"
                        }
                    }

                    ; controls row
                    Row {
                        width:   parent.width
                        spacing: 10

                        Text {
                            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                            text:  "→"
                            font.pixelSize: 28
                            color: "#333333"
                        }

                        ; target-language toggle
                        Rectangle {
                            width: 140; height: 50
                            border.color: "#aaaaaa"
                            border.width: 1
                            radius: 6

                            Text {
                                anchors.centerIn: parent
                                text:  translatePanel.targetLang
                                font.pixelSize: 22
                                color: "#333333"
                            }

                            MouseArea {
                                anchors.fill: parent
                                onClicked: langDropdown.visible = !langDropdown.visible
                            }
                        }

                        ; translate button
                        Rectangle {
                            width: 190; height: 50
                            color:  translatePanel.loading ? "#888888" : "#222222"
                            radius: 6

                            Text {
                                anchors.centerIn: parent
                                text:  translatePanel.loading ? "Loading…" : "Translate"
                                color: "white"
                                font.pixelSize: 22
                            }

                            MouseArea {
                                anchors.fill: parent
                                enabled: !translatePanel.loading
                                onClicked: translatePanel.doTranslate(
                                    translatePanel.sourceText,
                                    translatePanel.targetLang
                                )
                            }
                        }

                        ; load-text button (PDF text layer or OCR fallback)
                        Rectangle {
                            width: 140; height: 50
                            color:  "#444444"
                            radius: 6

                            Text {
                                anchors.centerIn: parent
                                text:  "Load Text"
                                color: "white"
                                font.pixelSize: 20
                            }

                            MouseArea {
                                anchors.fill: parent
                                onClicked: translatePanel.loadPageText()
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ; language picker dropdown
                    Rectangle {
                        id: langDropdown
                        visible: false
                        width:  parent.width
                        height: langItemCol.implicitHeight + 10
                        border.color: "#aaaaaa"
                        border.width: 1
                        radius: 6
                        color: "white"
                        z: 100

                        Column {
                            id: langItemCol
                            anchors { top: parent.top; topMargin: 5 }
                            width: parent.width

                            Repeater {
                                model: [
                                    { code: "en",    name: "English"                  },
                                    { code: "zh-CN", name: "Chinese (Simplified)"     },
                                    { code: "zh-TW", name: "Chinese (Traditional)"    },
                                    { code: "ja",    name: "Japanese"                 },
                                    { code: "ko",    name: "Korean"                   },
                                    { code: "es",    name: "Spanish"                  },
                                    { code: "fr",    name: "French"                   },
                                    { code: "de",    name: "German"                   },
                                    { code: "it",    name: "Italian"                  },
                                    { code: "pt",    name: "Portuguese"               },
                                    { code: "ru",    name: "Russian"                  },
                                    { code: "ar",    name: "Arabic"                   }
                                ]

                                delegate: Rectangle {
                                    width:  langItemCol.width
                                    height: 50
                                    color: modelData.code === translatePanel.targetLang
                                           ? "#e0e0e0" : "transparent"

                                    Text {
                                        anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                                        anchors.left:           parent.left
                                        anchors.leftMargin:     14
                                        text: modelData.name + "  (" + modelData.code + ")"
                                        font.pixelSize: 22
                                        color: "#222222"
                                    }

                                    MouseArea {
                                        anchors.fill: parent
                                        onClicked: {
                                            translatePanel.targetLang = modelData.code
                                            langDropdown.visible = false
                                            translatePanel.saveConfig()
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ; translation result
                    Rectangle {
                        visible: translatePanel.result !== "" || translatePanel.loading
                        width:   parent.width
                        height:  200
                        border.color: "#cccccc"
                        border.width: 1
                        radius: 6
                        color: "#f8f8f8"

                        Flickable {
                            anchors.fill:    parent
                            anchors.margins: 10
                            clip: true
                            contentHeight: resultText.implicitHeight

                            Text {
                                id: resultText
                                width:    parent.width
                                text:     translatePanel.loading
                                          ? "Translating…"
                                          : translatePanel.result
                                font.pixelSize: 24
                                color: translatePanel.loading ? "#666666" : "#111111"
                                wrapMode: Text.Wrap
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            ; ── functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

            function doTranslate(text, lang) {
                if (!text || text.trim() === "") return
                loading = true
                result  = ""
                var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                var url = "https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single"
                        + "?client=gtx"
                        + "&sl=auto"
                        + "&tl="  + encodeURIComponent(lang)
                        + "&dt=t"
                        + "&q="   + encodeURIComponent(text)
                xhr.open("GET", url)
                xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    loading = false
                    if (xhr.status === 200) {
                        try {
                            var res = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText)
                            var out = ""
                            for (var i = 0; i < res[0].length; i++) {
                                if (res[0][i] && res[0][i][0]) out += res[0][i][0]
                            }
                            result = out
                        } catch (e) {
                            result = "Error: could not parse translation response. " + e.message
                        }
                    } else {
                        result = "Error: HTTP " + xhr.status
                               + ". Check network connection."
                    }
                }
                xhr.send()
            }

            function loadPageText() {
                sourceText = ""
                var confXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                confXhr.open("GET",
                    "file:///home/root/.config/remarkable/xochitl.conf")
                confXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (confXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    if (confXhr.status !== 200) {
                        sourceText = "Error: could not read xochitl.conf (status "
                                   + confXhr.status + ")"
                        return
                    }
                    var docId   = ""
                    var pageNum = 0
                    var lines   = confXhr.responseText.split("\n")
                    for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
                        var ln = lines[i].trim()
                        if (ln.indexOf("CurrentDocumentId=") === 0)
                            docId   = ln.substring("CurrentDocumentId=".length).trim()
                        if (ln.indexOf("CurrentDocumentPageNumber=") === 0)
                            pageNum = parseInt(
                                ln.substring("CurrentDocumentPageNumber=".length)) || 0
                    }
                    if (!docId) {
                        sourceText = "Error: no open document found in xochitl.conf"
                        return
                    }
                    ; Read .content metadata to determine file type (pdf / notebook / epub)
                    var metaXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    metaXhr.open("GET",
                        "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"
                        + docId + ".content")
                    metaXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (metaXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        var fileType = "notebook"
                        if (metaXhr.status === 200) {
                            try {
                                var meta = JSON.parse(metaXhr.responseText)
                                fileType = meta.fileType || "notebook"
                            } catch (e) {}
                        }
                        if (fileType === "pdf") {
                            loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                        } else {
                            loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum)
                        }
                    }
                    metaXhr.send()
                }
                confXhr.send()
            }

            ; ── PDF text extraction ────────────────────────────────────────
            ; Reads the PDF binary and extracts text using the standard
            ; BT…ET text operator blocks.  Works for all digitally-created
            ; PDFs (Word, LaTeX, LibreOffice, etc.) without needing OCR.
            ; Scanned-image PDFs have no embedded text layer and will fall
            ; through to the .textconversion OCR fallback.

            function loadPdfText(docId, pageNum) {
                var pdfXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                pdfXhr.open("GET",
                    "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"
                    + docId + ".pdf")
                pdfXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (pdfXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    if (pdfXhr.status !== 200) {
                        ; PDF file not accessible — fall back to OCR conversion
                        loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum)
                        return
                    }
                    var extracted = extractPdfPageText(pdfXhr.responseText, pageNum)
                    if (extracted && extracted.trim().length > 0) {
                        sourceText = extracted
                    } else {
                        ; No readable text layer found (scanned PDF?) — try OCR fallback
                        loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum)
                    }
                }
                pdfXhr.send()
            }

            ; extractPdfPageText(pdfData, pageNum)
            ;   Parses PDF text streams from BT … ET blocks.
            ;   Tries to isolate the target page by counting /Type /Page objects
            ;   in the file to determine approximate page boundaries.
            ;   Falls back to returning all text when page isolation is not possible.
            function extractPdfPageText(pdfData, pageNum) {
                ; Collect byte-offsets of /Type /Page declarations so we can
                ; roughly map content streams to individual pages.
                var pageOffsets = []
                var searchPos   = 0
                var MARKER      = "/Type /Page"
                while (true) {
                    var pp = pdfData.indexOf(MARKER, searchPos)
                    if (pp === -1) break
                    pageOffsets.push(pp)
                    searchPos = pp + MARKER.length
                }

                ; Collect all BT…ET text blocks with their start offset
                var blocks    = []
                var pos       = 0
                var SAFE      = 100000  ; max loop iterations (~1 BT/ET block per iteration)
                var iters     = 0
                while (pos < pdfData.length && iters < SAFE) {
                    iters++
                    var btIdx = pdfData.indexOf("BT", pos)
                    if (btIdx === -1) break
                    ; BT must be surrounded by whitespace
                    var cb = btIdx > 0 ? pdfData[btIdx - 1] : "\n"
                    var ca = pdfData[btIdx + 2]
                    if (" \n\r".indexOf(cb) === -1 || " \n\r".indexOf(ca) === -1) {
                        pos = btIdx + 2
                        continue
                    }
                    var etIdx = pdfData.indexOf("ET", btIdx + 2)
                    if (etIdx === -1) break
                    var cbe = etIdx > 0 ? pdfData[etIdx - 1] : "\n"
                    var cae = etIdx + 2 < pdfData.length ? pdfData[etIdx + 2] : "\n"
                    if (" \n\r".indexOf(cbe) === -1 || " \n\r".indexOf(cae) === -1) {
                        pos = btIdx + 2
                        continue
                    }
                    blocks.push({ offset: btIdx, content: pdfData.substring(btIdx + 2, etIdx) })
                    pos = etIdx + 2
                }

                if (blocks.length === 0) return ""

                ; Filter blocks to those between this page's /Type /Page marker
                ; and the next one.  If page isolation is not possible use all blocks.
                var targetBlocks = blocks
                if (pageOffsets.length > 0) {
                    var pgStart = pageOffsets[pageNum] !== undefined
                                  ? pageOffsets[pageNum] : pageOffsets[0]
                    var pgEnd   = pageOffsets[pageNum + 1] !== undefined
                                  ? pageOffsets[pageNum + 1] : pdfData.length
                    var filtered = blocks.filter(function(b) {
                        return b.offset >= pgStart && b.offset < pgEnd
                    })
                    if (filtered.length > 0) targetBlocks = filtered
                }

                ; Extract text from each block
                var result = ""
                for (var bi = 0; bi < targetBlocks.length; bi++) {
                    result += parsePdfTextBlock(targetBlocks[bi].content)
                }
                return result.trim()
            }

            ; parsePdfTextBlock(block)
            ;   Extracts human-readable text from a single BT…ET block.
            ;   Handles: (str) Tj   [(str) num] TJ   (str) '   (str) "
            ;   and Td / TD / T* newline operators.
            function parsePdfTextBlock(block) {
                var text = ""
                var i    = 0
                while (i < block.length) {
                    var ch = block[i]

                    ; Literal string: ( … )
                    if (ch === "(") {
                        var end = i + 1
                        while (end < block.length) {
                            if (block[end] === "\\" && end + 1 < block.length) {
                                end += 2
                                continue
                            }
                            if (block[end] === ")") break
                            end++
                        }
                        var str = block.substring(i + 1, end)
                        ; Decode common PDF escape sequences
                        str = str.replace(/\\n/g, "\n")
                                 .replace(/\\r/g, " ")
                                 .replace(/\\t/g, " ")
                                 .replace(/\\\\/g, "\\")
                                 .replace(/\\([()\\])/g, "$1")
                                 .replace(/\\([0-7]{1,3})/g, function(m, oct) {
                                     return String.fromCharCode(parseInt(oct, 8))
                                 })
                        ; Accept if followed by Tj, TJ, ' or "
                        var rest = block.substring(end + 1).trimStart()
                        if (/^(Tj|TJ|'|")/.test(rest)) text += str
                        i = end + 1
                        continue
                    }

                    ; Array form: [ … ] TJ
                    if (ch === "[") {
                        var aEnd = block.indexOf("]", i)
                        if (aEnd !== -1) {
                            var afterArr = block.substring(aEnd + 1).trimStart()
                            if (afterArr.indexOf("TJ") === 0) {
                                var arr = block.substring(i + 1, aEnd)
                                var ai  = 0
                                while (ai < arr.length) {
                                    if (arr[ai] === "(") {
                                        var ae = ai + 1
                                        while (ae < arr.length) {
                                            if (arr[ae] === "\\" && ae + 1 < arr.length) {
                                                ae += 2; continue
                                            }
                                            if (arr[ae] === ")") break
                                            ae++
                                        }
                                        var chunk = arr.substring(ai + 1, ae)
                                        ; Decode PDF escape sequences — same as literal string path
                                        chunk = chunk.replace(/\\n/g, "\n")
                                                     .replace(/\\r/g, " ")
                                                     .replace(/\\t/g, " ")
                                                     .replace(/\\\\/g, "\\")
                                                     .replace(/\\([()\\])/g, "$1")
                                                     .replace(/\\([0-7]{1,3})/g, function(m, oct) {
                                                         return String.fromCharCode(parseInt(oct, 8))
                                                     })
                                        text += chunk
                                        ai = ae + 1
                                    } else if (arr[ai] === "-" || (arr[ai] >= "0" && arr[ai] <= "9")) {
                                        ; Large negative spacing value = word gap
                                        var ne = ai
                                        while (ne < arr.length && arr[ne] !== " " && arr[ne] !== "(" && arr[ne] !== "\n") ne++
                                        var nv = parseFloat(arr.substring(ai, ne))
                                        if (nv < -100) text += " "
                                        ai = ne
                                    } else { ai++ }
                                }
                                i = aEnd + 1
                                continue
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ; Td, TD, T* → new line
                    if (ch === "T" && i + 1 < block.length) {
                        var nx = block[i + 1]
                        if (nx === "d" || nx === "D" || nx === "*") {
                            text += "\n"; i += 2; continue
                        }
                    }

                    i++
                }
                return text
            }

            ; ── Notebook / ePub text (xochitl handwriting-to-text) ────────
            function loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum) {
                var ocrXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                ocrXhr.open("GET",
                    "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"
                    + docId + ".textconversion")
                ocrXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (ocrXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    if (ocrXhr.status !== 200) {
                        sourceText = "Error: text data not found for this document. "
                                   + "For PDFs: ensure the file has an embedded text layer. "
                                   + "For notebooks: enable handwriting-to-text conversion."
                        return
                    }
                    try {
                        var data = JSON.parse(ocrXhr.responseText)
                        if (data && typeof data.text === "string") {
                            sourceText = data.text
                        } else if (data && Array.isArray(data.pages)) {
                            var pg = data.pages[pageNum]
                            sourceText = pg ? (pg.text || "") : ""
                        } else {
                            sourceText = "Error: unrecognised text format."
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                        sourceText = "Error: failed to parse text data. " + e.message
                    }
                }
                ocrXhr.send()
            }

            function loadConfig() {
                var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                xhr.open("GET",
                    "file:///home/root/.config/translate-plugin.json")
                xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    if (xhr.status !== 200) return   ; first-run: no config file yet
                    try {
                        var cfg = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText)
                        if (cfg.targetLang)        targetLang = cfg.targetLang
                        if (cfg.x !== undefined)   savedX = cfg.x
                        if (cfg.y !== undefined)   savedY = cfg.y
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.log("TranslatePlugin: config parse error: " + e.message)
                    }
                }
                xhr.send()
            }

            function saveConfig() {
                var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                xhr.open("PUT",
                    "file:///home/root/.config/translate-plugin.json")
                xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                    if (xhr.status !== 200 && xhr.status !== 0) {
                        console.log("TranslatePlugin: failed to save config, status: "
                                    + xhr.status)
                    }
                }
                xhr.send(JSON.stringify({
                    targetLang: targetLang,
                    x:          savedX,
                    y:          savedY
                }))
            }

            Component.onCompleted: loadConfig()
        }
    }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
